name: pulsewatch-api
description: PulseWatch API Server - Express backend for uptime monitoring

PORT.description: Port the server listens on (Heroku sets this automatically)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (provided by Heroku Postgres add-on)

FRONTEND_URL.description: URL of the Vercel frontend (e.g. https://pulsewatch.vercel.app) - used for CORS
